where.if: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND id NOT IN (SELECT plan_benefits_id from tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list WHERE plan_list_id = #{planId})

choose.when: AND display_period_start <= NOW() AND (display_period_end >= NOW() OR display_period_end IS NULL)

mapper.sql: id ,title ,content ,display_yn ,major_category_id ,minor_category_id ,(select name from tb_pmb_benefits_category where id = a.major_category_id LIMIT 1) majorCategoryName ,(select name from tb_pmb_benefits_category where id = a.minor_category_id AND parent_id = a.major_category_id LIMIT 1) minorCategoryName ,provider ,name ,icon ,memo ,benefit_url ,benefit_image ,benefit_content ,display_period_start ,display_period_end ,create_date ,create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,modified_date ,modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm ,IFNULL(b.plan_benefits_id, 0) plan_benefits_id ,IFNULL(planCount, 0 ) planCount
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits a LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select plan_benefits_id, count(*) as planCount from tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list group by plan_benefits_id ) as b ON a.id = b.plan_benefits_id WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_benefits ( title, content, display_yn, create_id, modified_id, provider, name, icon, memo, benefit_url, benefit_image, benefit_content, display_period_start, display_period_end, major_category_id, minor_category_id ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{displayYn}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId}, #{provider}, #{name}, #{icon}, #{memo}, #{benefitUrl}, #{benefitImage}, #{benefitContent}, #{displayPeriodStart}, #{displayPeriodEnd}, #{majorCategoryId}, #{minorCategoryId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_benefits SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, display_yn = #{displayYn}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId}, provider = #{provider}, name = #{name}, icon = #{icon}, memo = #{memo}, benefit_url = #{benefitUrl}, benefit_image = #{benefitImage}, benefit_content = #{benefitContent}, display_period_start = #{displayPeriodStart}, display_period_end = #{displayPeriodEnd}, major_category_id = #{majorCategoryId}, minor_category_id = #{minorCategoryId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.sql: a.id ,a.plan_list_id ,a.order_no ,b.plan_name as planName ,a.plan_benefits_id ,c.title as benefitTitle ,c.content as benefitContent ,c.provider ,c.major_category_id ,c.minor_category_id ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.create_id) as createNm ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(a.modified_id) as modifiedNm
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id
ORDER BY a.plan_list_id, a.order_no
SELECT count(1) FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id

SELECT
FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list a, tb_pmb_plan_list b, tb_pmb_plan_benefits c WHERE a.plan_list_id = b.id AND a.plan_benefits_id = c.id AND a.id=#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list (plan_list_id, plan_benefits_id,order_no,create_id, modified_id) VALUES ( #{planListId}, #{planBenefitsId}, #{orderNo}, #{createId}, #{modifiedId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list SET plan_list_id = #{planListId}, plan_benefits_id = #{planBenefitsId}, order_no = #{orderNo}, modified_date = NOW(), modified_id = #{modifiedId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.id , A.plan_list_id , A.plan_benefits_id , A.order_no , B.uuid , B.mno , B.plan_name , B.after_price , B.sale_price , B.promotion_period , B.sup_data_total , B.sup_qos , C.name hostNm , B.disp_yn , B.sale_status FROM tb_pmb_plan_benefits_list A JOIN tb_pmb_plan_list B ON A.plan_list_id = B.id LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_mbm_company_list as C ON B.host = C.id WHERE A.plan_benefits_id = #{id} ORDER BY A.order_no ASC
